subcodes.first_line: O lofty and exalted branch! Upon thee be the glory of God, His light, His radiance, His grace and His loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الافنون الشامخ الرفیع علیک بهاء الله و نوره و ضیائه و فضله و عنایته و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
